description: Advance 思维库 from a shell prototype into a real working workspace by wiring the third column toward the existing chat system, formalizing state and fixtures, and polishing the Input / View / Chat experience against the current desktop shell.

userStories.title: Embed a real chat-integrated third-column shell for 思维库
userStories.description: As a user, I want the third column to reuse the real iClaw chat interaction model so that 思维库 is not a fake mock panel and can evolve into a true working context-aware conversation surface.
acceptanceCriteria: ThoughtLibraryView third column uses a dedicated chat-shell component rather than hardcoded sample bubbles
The chat shell exposes the selected item title as a persistent context chip near the composer
The chat shell message area is driven by component state instead of fixed seed JSX
The chat shell keeps the local-first Web 搜索 warning state visible when enabled
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Do not attempt full OpenClaw engine coupling yet; make the chat shell architecture-ready and stateful.

userStories.title: Persist 思维库 tab and selected-item state inside the desktop workspace
userStories.description: As a user, I want 思维库 to remember which tab and object I was working on so that reopening the workspace feels continuous instead of resetting every time.
acceptanceCriteria: ThoughtLibraryView stores active tab in a durable local desktop persistence key
ThoughtLibraryView stores selected item id per tab in a durable local desktop persistence key
Reloading the app restores the last active 思维库 tab and selection when valid
Invalid or missing stored ids safely fall back to the first available item in the active tab
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Keep storage scoped to the current desktop user context where possible.

userStories.title: Extract typed fixture data and view helpers for 素材 / 图谱 / 成果
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the current shell data moved out of the page component into typed fixtures/helpers so that the feature is easier to evolve toward real data later.
acceptanceCriteria: ThoughtLibraryView no longer defines all fixture arrays inline inside the component body
Create a dedicated typed fixture module for 素材 / 图谱 / 成果 items
Create helper functions for resolving panel title, description, and tab collections outside the component render body
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: This is a refactor story meant to reduce future integration risk.

userStories.title: Refine the 图谱 middle-column view into page-view and graph-view modes
userStories.description: As a user, I want the 图谱 tab to clearly support both readable page view and relationship graph view so that the second column expresses the Graph-first model instead of a single placeholder card.
acceptanceCriteria: 图谱 tab provides two visible sub-modes: 页面视图 and 图谱视图
页面视图 shows structured explanatory content for the selected graph item
图谱视图 shows a relationship canvas-style layout with at least central node, related nodes, and visible edges
Switching sub-modes does not clear the selected graph item
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Keep it graph-first but still readable; no external graph library required in this iteration.

userStories.title: Polish 思维库 shell navigation behavior and browser-level verification
userStories.description: As a user, I want 思维库 to feel stable when switching in and out of it so that compact navigation mode and custom page header feel intentional and production-ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Entering 思维库 collapses the app sidebar without corrupting the saved sidebar preference for other views
Leaving 思维库 restores normal shell layout behavior for non-thought-library views
思维库 uses its own local page header while the global header stays hidden only for that view
Browser verification confirms 思维库 opens from the sidebar and renders the three-column layout without runtime errors
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: This story is the final stabilization pass for the phase-2 shell.
